popularStory.headline: Cockayne Families
popularStory.description:
Is there another Old Derbshire family with such memorabilia for the historian, with so many vicissitudes and so many dramatic episodes, as the Cokaynes? 

Derbyshire provides much of the finest scener …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Cokayne MP於大約1388年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩時，他的父親Edmund Cokayne33歲，母親Elizabeth de Harthull29歲。他於1416年4月27日與Margaret Longford結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1438年6月7日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿希布恩享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿希布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Cokayne MP于大约1388年出生在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩时，他的父亲Edmund Cokayne33岁，母亲Elizabeth de Harthull29岁。他于1416年4月27日与Margaret Longford结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1438年6月7日在英国英格兰德比夏爾阿希布恩享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾阿希布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Cokayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cockayne
meanings: English (Midlands and Yorkshire): nickname for a dreamer, from Middle English cokayne ‘cloud-cuckooland’, the name of an imaginary paradise (Old French (pays de) cocaigne, from Middle Low German kōkenje, a diminutive of kōke ‘cake’, since in this land the houses were thought to be made of cake). It may also be a variant of Cocking or from the unflattering Middle English nickname cokin (Old French coquin) ‘disreputable person’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Cokayne MP was born about 1388, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, his father, Edmund Cokayne, was 33 and his mother, Elizabeth de Harthull, was 29. He married Margaret Longford on 27 April 1416. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 7 June 1438, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Cokayne MP est né environ 1388, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Cokayne, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Harthull, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Longford le 27 avril 1416. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 juin 1438, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Cokayne MP um 1388 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Cokayne 33 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Harthull 29. Er hat am 27. April 1416 Margaret Longford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Juni 1438 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cokayne MP è nato il circa 1388 nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Edmund Cokayne, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Harthull, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Longford il 27 aprile 1416. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 giugno 1438, nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cokayne MPが約1388年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで生まれた時，父Edmund Cokayneは33歳，母Elizabeth de Harthullは29歳であった。1416年4月27日にMargaret Longfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1438年6月7日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Cokayne MP(이)가 대략 1388년 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Cokayne(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Harthull(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1416년 4월 27일 Margaret Longford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년 6월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애쉬보우른에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애쉬보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cokayne MP nasceu aproximadamente 1388, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Cokayne, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Harthull, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Longford em 27 de abril de 1416. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de junho de 1438, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Cokayne MP родился около 1388 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Cokayne было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Harthull, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Longford 27 апреля 1416 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 июня 1438 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Cokayne MP nació aproximadamente 1388, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Cokayne, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Harthull, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Longford el 27 de abril de 1416. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de junio de 1438, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
